title: Require Recipe Dag Contract Metadata
forbids: Studio recipe-DAG import graph reaching generated maps, dist/mod outputs, runtime stage indexes, recipe runtime files, or authoring roots instead of contract-only surfaces
why: The Studio recipe-DAG service consumes contract metadata through a graph-aware contract-only boundary; direct source-token bans are split to Grit.
remediate: Route Studio recipe-DAG metadata through contract-only recipe surfaces.
message: Studio recipe-DAG import graph crossed contract-only boundaries.
